prediction_ref.short_label: Indirect prompt injection becomes a top CVE category (CVSS 8.0+ regulars by Q3 2026)

Okta Newsroom - Okta announces new blueprint for the secure agentic enterprise
TrueFoundry - MCP Security Explained: Guide to Zero Trust for Agentic AI

bridge.narrative: Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760's CVSS 9.8 GGUF-template RCE, ang Pillar Security's Antigravity prompt-injection sandbox escape, ang Okta's Showcase 2026 Agent Gateway bilang central MCP control plane na may credential vaulting at universal logout, at ang TrueFoundry's zero-trust MCP framing ay bumubuo ng protocol-level pressure plus control-plane response, habang ang OWASP MCP Top 10 publication at ang standardized mTLS / OAuth scope spec ay nananatiling nakabinbin.
bridge.remaining_gap: Kailangan ng OWASP MCP Top 10 publication plus Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare co-published MCP-over-mTLS at OAuth scope specification.
